message:
Add explicit wildcard search support (sux.3)

- Preserve asterisks in query sanitization for wildcard patterns
- Add WildcardPattern enum: Exact, Prefix, Suffix, Substring
- Build Tantivy RegexQuery for suffix (*foo) and substring (*foo*) patterns
- Use existing edge n-gram support for prefix patterns (foo*)
- Add escape_regex helper for safe pattern construction
- Refactor thread-local searcher caching with generation tracking

Wildcards now work as follows:
- foo* → prefix match (via edge n-grams, fast)
- *foo → suffix match (via RegexQuery)
- *foo* → substring match (via RegexQuery)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
